response.justification: This is a Staff-level engineer with 25+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior/mid-level role. While technically exceptional and covering all required skills, the massive seniority mismatch creates a poor fit: the candidate would likely become bored within months, expect senior-level compensation and responsibility, and leave for appropriate-level work. Overqualification is a retention risk, not an asset for this position.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript and Node.js expertise across senior roles, directly matching core tech stack needs
Demonstrated full-stack capability with React, REST APIs, and modern web architecture across 25+ years
Strong cloud infrastructure experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) covering nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Massively overqualified—Staff engineer applying for entry-level role creates severe seniority mismatch and expectation misalignment
High retention risk—candidate would likely outgrow the role within 6-12 months and seek more senior opportunities
PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned; experience documented as 'SQL' and MongoDB-heavy, though competency is not in question
